testimonials.quote: My daughter has loved every Saturday morning at Gallery Music. The teachers are wonderful and the fees are so affordable. It’s been a fantastic experience for our whole family.
testimonials.author: Parent of a violin student

testimonials.quote: We were looking for music lessons that wouldn’t break the bank. Gallery Music Centre has been perfect — great teaching, friendly community, and our son can’t wait for Saturday mornings.
testimonials.author: Parent of a keyboard student

testimonials.quote: The annual concert was such a highlight. Seeing the kids perform together after a year of learning was really special. Highly recommend Gallery to any family in the Hutt Valley.
testimonials.author: Parent of a cello student
